description_long: This is a modern, L-shaped sectional sofa with a dark, solid-colored fabric upholstery. The sofa features a low-profile design with straight, clean lines and a modular configuration, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments. It has multiple seat and back cushions that are uniform in size and appear to be attached, providing a consistent and structured look. The armrests are present on both ends, straight and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to the sofa's boxy silhouette. The sofa is supported by slender, exposed legs, likely made of metal, which elevate it slightly above the ground and add to its minimalist aesthetic. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, ideal for public spaces, lobbies, or modern living areas.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa with dark fabric upholstery, straight armrests, and slim metal legs. It features uniform seat and back cushions in a clean, modular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, both armrests, and the uniform arrangement of seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the chaise section and the slim, exposed legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length and structure.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the sectional's extension and the straight armrest on the far end.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six uniform, attached seat cushions and six matching back cushions arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout, all cushions are rectangular and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests present at both ends, at the same height as the backrest, with no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, exposed metal legs positioned at the corners and sectional junctions, straight and cylindrical with a minimalist finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with attached rectangular cushions, matching the seat cushion arrangement and height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
